# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Audio feature analysis (manually appended — not produced by uv compile yet)
# Pulls librosa + transitive numpy/scipy/numba via pip at install time.
# Used by backend/audio_features/* — fully lazy-imported so absence of the
# packages at runtime only disables the audio-features worker, not the app.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
librosa==0.10.2.post1
mutagen==1.47.0
soundfile==0.12.1
pyloudnorm==0.1.1

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Sonic clustering / Music Map (v13.0) — manually appended, pin loosely
# Used by backend/audio_features/clustering.py — lazy-imported so absence
# only disables the cluster pipeline, not the rest of the app.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
scikit-learn>=1.4
umap-learn>=0.5.5
hdbscan>=0.8.33

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CLAP text-to-audio search (v13.0)
# laion-clap pulls a large model lazily on first use (~600 MB cached to
# CLAP_CACHE_DIR). Disabled by default via CLAP_ENABLED=false.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
laion-clap>=1.1.6
transformers>=4.40

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Lyrics semantic search (v13.0)
# ONNX-runtime + tokenizers used by backend/lyrics/embedder.py.
# Disabled by default via LYRICS_SEARCH_ENABLED=false.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
onnxruntime>=1.17
tokenizers>=0.15
